title: Buccaneers Projected to Make Run at Pro Bowl TE for Baker Mayfield
description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers desperately need more TE depth, and Pro Bowler Jonnu Smith could be the perfect addition for the team.

title: 3 WWE Superstars Who Could Challenge Roman Reigns for the Title
description: Roman Reigns has announced that he is back in WWE full-time this summer. Which superstars should he face for the world title?

title: Oil prices soar on fears of long supply disruption, US siege of Iran ports
description: US President Trump meets with oil firms over ways to minimise impact on fuel supplies amid US blockade of Iranian ports.

title: Outlaw country music legend David Allan Coe dead at 86
description: Outlaw country music legend and pioneer songwriter David Allan Coe has died. He was 86.
